zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Royden於1523年出生在英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Wentworth43歲，母親Margaret Whetenhall41歲。她於1542年1月22日與John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 安東林 煙雨 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 武朋 瓦利布盧可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年8月19日在她的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Royden于1523年出生在英国肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Wentworth43岁，母亲Margaret Whetenhall41岁。她于1542年1月22日与John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf在英国英格兰倫敦聖 安東林 煙雨 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 武朋 瓦利布盧可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年8月19日在她的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Royden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Roydon (Essex), Roydon near Diss (Norfolk), Roydon near King’s Lynn (Norfolk), or Roydon Drift (Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Royden was born in 1523, in East Peckham, Kent, England, her father, Thomas Wentworth, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Whetenhall, was 41. She married John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf on 22 January 1542, in St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 19 August 1595, in her hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Royden est née en 1523, à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wentworth, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whetenhall, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf le 22 janvier 1542, à St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1595, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Royden 1523 in East Peckham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wentworth 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Whetenhall 41. Sie hat am 22. Januar 1542 in St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, England, United Kingdom John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. August 1595 im Alter von 72 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Royden è nata il nel 1523 nel East Peckham, Kent, England, sua padre, Thomas Wentworth, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margaret Whetenhall, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf il 22 gennaio 1542, nel St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Roydenが1523年にイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Wentworthは43歳，母Margaret Whetenhallは41歳であった。1542年1月22日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト アンソリン ウィス スト ジョン ス バプティスト ウプオン ワルブルークでJohn Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年8月19日に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.St Antholin with St John the Baptist upo: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤토린 위스 스트 존 테 바프티스트 업 월브룩
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Royden(이)가 1523년 영국 켄트 이스트 펙함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wentworth(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Whetenhall(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1542년 1월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤토린 위스 스트 존 테 바프티스트 업 월브룩에서 John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 8월 19일 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Royden nasceu em 1523, em East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wentworth, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whetenhall, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf em 22 de janeiro de 1542, em St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1595, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.St Antholin with St John the Baptist upo: ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Royden родилась в 1523 г. в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wentworth было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whetenhall, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf 22 января 1542 г. в местности ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 19 августа 1595 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Royden nació en 1523, en East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wentworth, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Whetenhall, tenía 41 años. Se casó con John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf el 22 de enero de 1542, en St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1595, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
